mapper.sql: id, event_type as eventType, recipient_user_id as recipientUserId, aggregate_type as aggregateType, aggregate_id as aggregateId, payload, status, attempt_count as attemptCount, last_error as lastError, created_at as createdAt, processed_at as processedAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.insert: insert into notification_outbox (event_type, recipient_user_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, status, attempt_count, created_at) values (#{eventType}, #{recipientUserId}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{payload}::jsonb, #{status}, #{attemptCount}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update notification_outbox set status = #{status}, processed_at = #{processedAt}, last_error = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update notification_outbox set status = #{status}, attempt_count = #{attemptCount}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
